Users can mark regions with `// #region Name` and `// #endregion` comments to create named foldable sections and jump to them using Cmd+Shift+R.\n\n## Key Files Created/Modified\n\n### New Files\n1. **src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/namedRegionProvider.ts**\n   - Detects `#region` and `#endregion` markers in source code\n   - Extracts region names from markers like `// #region MyName`\n   - Returns FoldingRegions with region names embedded in the names array\n   - Supports both line comments (`//`) and block comments (`/* */`)\n\n2. **src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/test/browser/namedRegionProvider.test.ts**\n   - Comprehensive test suite with 10 test cases\n   - Tests simple regions, nested regions, unnamed regions, descriptions in parentheses\n   - Handles edge cases like unmatched endregions and leading whitespace\n\n### Modified Files\n1. **src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/foldingRanges.ts**\n   - Added `name?: string` field to FoldRange interface\n   - Added `_names` field to FoldingRegions class\n   - Added `getName(index)` and `hasNames()` methods\n   - Updated `fromFoldRanges()` to preserve region names\n   - Updated `toFoldRange()` to include name field\n\n2. **src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/folding.ts**\n   - Imported NamedRegionProvider and IQuickInputService\n   - Added `namedRegionProvider` field to FoldingController\n   - Created NamedRegionProvider instance in getRangeProvider()\n   - Added public `getNamedRegionProvider()` method\n   - Implemented GoToNamedRegionAction command:\n     - Shows quick-pick menu with all named regions\n     - Navigates to selected region\n     - Keybinding: Cmd+Shift+R (Ctrl+Shift+R on Windows/Linux)\n   - Registered action via registerEditorAction()\n\n## Implementation Details\n\n### Region Detection\n- Pattern: `#region\\s+(.+?)(?:\\s*\\(|$)` extracts name before optional description in parentheses\n- Supports named regions: `#region MySection`\n- Supports unnamed regions: `#region`\n- Supports descriptions: `#region MyRegion (description here)`\n\n### Data Storage\n- Region names are stored as optional entries in FoldingRegions._names array\n- Names correspond to region indices in the folding regions structure\n- Accessible via FoldingRegions.getName(index)\n\n### Navigation Command\n- Command ID: `editor.goToNamedRegion`\n- Keybinding: Ctrl+Shift+K N (Windows/Linux) / Cmd+Shift+K N (macOS)\n- Shows quick-pick with region names, line numbers, and first line preview\n- Jumps to region start line and centers view on selection\n\n## Testing\nRun tests with: `npm run test-browser -- --grep \"Named Region Folding\"`\n\n## Architecture Decisions\n1. Separate provider allows focused region detection without modifying existing indent/syntax providers\n2. Names stored in FoldingRegions structure so they're preserved during merging\n3. Quick-pick UI for navigation provides discoverable, interactive region browsing\n4. Provider approach allows future enhancements like folding only named regions\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":152,"cache_read_input_tokens":102424,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":152},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"42f92ed0-baea-464d-b1ae-3e103bfc19fd","uuid":"bc1ea7f0-c8c6-4651-82ab-37428470b4d1"}

Users can mark regions with `// #region Name` and `// #endregion` comments to create named foldable sections and jump to them using Cmd+Shift+R.\n\n## Key Files Created/Modified\n\n### New Files\n1. **src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/namedRegionProvider.ts**\n   - Detects `#region` and `#endregion` markers in source code\n   - Extracts region names from markers like `// #region MyName`\n   - Returns FoldingRegions with region names embedded in the names array\n   - Supports both line comments (`//`) and block comments (`/* */`)\n\n2. **src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/test/browser/namedRegionProvider.test.ts**\n   - Comprehensive test suite with 10 test cases\n   - Tests simple regions, nested regions, unnamed regions, descriptions in parentheses\n   - Handles edge cases like unmatched endregions and leading whitespace\n\n### Modified Files\n1. **src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/foldingRanges.ts**\n   - Added `name?: string` field to FoldRange interface\n   - Added `_names` field to FoldingRegions class\n   - Added `getName(index)` and `hasNames()` methods\n   - Updated `fromFoldRanges()` to preserve region names\n   - Updated `toFoldRange()` to include name field\n\n2. **src/vs/editor/contrib/folding/browser/folding.ts**\n   - Imported NamedRegionProvider and IQuickInputService\n   - Added `namedRegionProvider` field to FoldingController\n   - Created NamedRegionProvider instance in getRangeProvider()\n   - Added public `getNamedRegionProvider()` method\n   - Implemented GoToNamedRegionAction command:\n     - Shows quick-pick menu with all named regions\n     - Navigates to selected region\n     - Keybinding: Cmd+Shift+R (Ctrl+Shift+R on Windows/Linux)\n   - Registered action via registerEditorAction()\n\n## Implementation Details\n\n### Region Detection\n- Pattern: `#region\\s+(.+?)(?:\\s*\\(|$)` extracts name before optional description in parentheses\n- Supports named regions: `#region MySection`\n- Supports unnamed regions: `#region`\n- Supports descriptions: `#region MyRegion (description here)`\n\n### Data Storage\n- Region names are stored as optional entries in FoldingRegions._names array\n- Names correspond to region indices in the folding regions structure\n- Accessible via FoldingRegions.getName(index)\n\n### Navigation Command\n- Command ID: `editor.goToNamedRegion`\n- Keybinding: Ctrl+Shift+K N (Windows/Linux) / Cmd+Shift+K N (macOS)\n- Shows quick-pick with region names, line numbers, and first line preview\n- Jumps to region start line and centers view on selection\n\n## Testing\nRun tests with: `npm run test-browser -- --grep \"Named Region Folding\"`\n\n## Architecture Decisions\n1.
